positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a graceful leaping fox surrounded by celestial elements, such as crescent moons and abstract constellations. The design should feature thick, clean linework with solid, bold color blocks—predominantly deep midnight blue, burnished gold, and warm terracotta. The fox should be the central, dynamic silhouette, rendered with sharp edges and a sense of motion. The background elements should look like a dreamy, cosmic map, integrating floral motifs (such as stylized lunar lilies and wispy nebula clouds) seamlessly into the starry void. Style: Neo-traditional tattoo art meets modern scientific illustration. Composition: Perfectly centered, highly symmetrical, high contrast, designed for frontal apparel placement. Lighting: Studio quality, highly illuminated, emphasizing crisp edges and flat color saturation. Detail: Vector art quality, scalable for large prints.
negative: photorealistic, blurred, noisy, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, text, watermark, logos, signatures, artifacts, amateur drawing, copyright, messy, ugly
